text.title: Greenfield Infra Decision Matrix Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: kickoff-and-constraints
step.action: 2h session: enumerate constraints (compliance, budget, scale, team).

step.name: list-candidates-per-axis
step.action: Per axis, list 2-5 candidates. Apply red-flags.
step.note: Gate: If all candidates disqualified for an axis, STOP — review constraints or expand candidates.

step.name: weight-and-score
step.action: Define weights up-front. Score each candidate 1-5 with rationale.

step.name: pick-and-record
step.action: Pick top-scoring per axis. Write rationale. Document alternatives considered.

step.name: signoff-and-publish
step.action: Engineering leader + tech-lead + security lead sign. Publish to architecture wiki. Set revisit_due_date.
